questions.question: 10 (a) A magnet and a coil are attached separately to a door and a door frame as shown in Fig. 10.1. The purpose of the arrangement is to activate a circuit connected to an LED indicator when the door is opening or closing. This will provide a visual indication that the door is being used. N S magnet coil door indicator door frame Fig. 10.1 Init

parts.text: 10 (a) A magnet and a coil are attached separately to a door and a door frame as shown in Fig. 10.1. The purpose of the arrangement is to activate a circuit connected to an LED indicator when the door is opening or closing. This will provide a visual indication that the door is being used. N S magnet coil door indicator door frame Fig. 10.1 Init
parts.answer: (i) movement of magnet relative to coil OR induces emf / pd / current (across / in LED) B1 light goes off when magnet no longer directly below coil B1 B1 door / magnet moving for shorter length of time B1 • quick response • protects against electric shock • protects against overheating • (easily) re-settable • avoids damage to lawnmower B2 / October/November 2019
